name: cubism
description: Geometric fragmentation, multiple viewpoints, angular faceted forms.
palette_hint: muted earth tones with one saturated accent

name: vaporwave
description: Retro-futuristic neon nostalgia: Greek busts, 80s computing, gradient grids.
palette_hint: magenta and cyan on deep purple

name: ukiyo-e
description: Japanese woodblock print: flat color planes, bold linework, asymmetric composition, decorative wave motifs.
palette_hint: indigo, vermilion, gold leaf on cream

name: brutalism
description: Raw exposed concrete, monumental and harsh, naked structure, oversized typography.

name: claymation
description: Hand-sculpted clay aesthetic, soft imperfect edges, tactile and warm.
palette_hint: earthy clay tones, soft creams and rust

name: ascii_terminal
description: Pure text rendering: box-drawing characters, ASCII art, CRT phosphor glow.
palette_hint: monochrome amber or green on black

name: stained_glass
description: Cathedral window panels: thick black leading, saturated colored shards.
palette_hint: jewel tones (ruby, emerald, sapphire) on black grout

name: blueprint
description: Technical drafting on blueprint paper: white linework on blue, dimension lines and measurements visible.

name: risograph
description: Limited-color screen printing: visible registration mismatch, grainy texture, two-color overlay.

name: bauhaus
description: Geometric primitives (circle/triangle/square), primary colors, rigorous grid, sans-serif.

name: papercut
description: Layered paper silhouettes with hard edges, drop shadows between layers, foreground/midground/background depth.
palette_hint: 5 stacked solid colours separated by soft shadow gaps

name: art_nouveau
description: Flowing organic curves, decorative whiplash lines, ornamental floral borders, Alphonse Mucha framings.
palette_hint: muted greens and golds with cream and ochre

name: pop_art
description: Bold solid colors, halftone benday dots, thick black outlines, Roy Lichtenstein punch.
palette_hint: primary red and yellow with thick black contour

name: charcoal_sketch
description: Smudged graphite and charcoal strokes, visible paper grain, gestural unfinished feel.
palette_hint: warm white paper with three values of soft black

name: glitch_datamosh
description: Corrupted VHS / lossy compression artefacts, RGB channel shift, frame tearing, bitmap mush.
palette_hint: RGB-shifted magenta-cyan with scan-line noise on near-black

name: van_gogh_impasto
description: Thick directional brushstrokes, visible swirl rhythm, post-impressionist swirling skies and grass.
palette_hint: saturated cobalt and chrome yellow with sienna swirls
